response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with nearly 17 years of experience and current Staff-level tenure at Stripe, but the resume contains no meaningful signal for the core competencies this role demands: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or growth measurement systems. The background is that of a product/backend generalist rather than a principal-level growth and experimentation specialist, and there is no evidence of owning cross-team experimentation strategy, statistical analysis workflows, or rollout-risk management at enterprise scale.
strengths: Long tenure with distributed systems exposure — Sociomantic role handled millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency microservices
Current Staff-level role at Stripe with contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, showing relevance to modern engineering platforms
Broad polyglot background covering JavaScript/TypeScript, C#, Java, and C++, meeting the language requirements listed in the JD
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, or experiment assignment and targeting systems
No mention of telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, or statistical methods for experimental analysis — all central to the role
No evidence of principal-level growth strategy ownership, cross-team experimentation leadership, or multi-workstream initiative delivery at IC6 scope

key_factors.factor: Staff-level seniority and AI tooling work
